name: Gramma Bahrt's Salmon Piroghi
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 425°F.
2. Line a 9-inch pie pan with pastry dough and brush with 1 tablespoon melted butter. Bake until the crust begins to color (5-8 minutes).
3. Pat half of the rice onto the bottom and sides of the crust.
4. Add salmon in an even layer and sprinkle with nutmeg-flavored lemon juice.
5. Add egg slices and season with salt, pepper, and onion salt to taste.
6. Top with remaining rice and pour over all 1/4 cup butter-chive mixture.
7. Adjust top crust, flute edges, vent the crust, and brush with Egg Glaze.
8. Bake at 400°F for about 35 minutes. If the crust browns too quickly, loosely cover it with foil.
9. Sprinkle onion salt just before serving and garnish with parsley lightly dipped in paprika.
10. Cut into wedge-shaped servings and serve with a fresh spinach salad and croissants.
Serves: 6
